login.title: Login
login.totpDescription: Two-factor authentication is enabled. Enter the code from your authenticator app.
login.errorTotpExpired: TOTP challenge expired or invalid. Please login again.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.smtpPassHint: Email authorization code or password. For QQ mail, enable SMTP service to get an authorization code
settings.smtpFromEmailHint: Sender email, should match the SMTP user
settings.smtpFromNameHint: Sender name seen by recipients, e.g. AIGCS
settings.smtpTestEmailHint: Leave empty to send to the current user's email
settings.corsDesc: One origin per line. Leave empty to allow only site domains. Enter * to allow all. Example:
settings.emailLocaleHint: Language used for emails sent to users.
settings.smtpRequirement: Requires SMTP to be configured above.
settings.apiTokensDesc: Manage API tokens for programmatic access
settings.globalSystemPromptDesc: Always prepended to the per-provider prompt template for all generated comments.
settings.globalSystemPromptPlaceholder: Optional: add global instructions for all AI commenters...
settings.siteFaviconDesc: Upload an image or enter a URL. Falls back to the default icon.
settings.dataImportConfirm: Import will overwrite existing data. Are you sure?

sites.title: Sites
sites.domainHint: Domain must match your site (blog) URL for the Widget to work. Also affected by CORS.
sites.name: Name
sites.noSites: No sites yet. Add your first site to get started.
sites.noProviders: No providers yet. Add your first AI provider.
sites.noCache: No cache entries. Cache will be created when visitors access pages.
sites.noComments: No comments yet. Configure providers and comments will be auto-generated.
sites.generateHint: Enter a page URL to manually trigger AI comment generation.
sites.selectorHint: Try order: user input → site setting → CMS selectors → article → Readability → main → body
sites.contentSelectorHint: Comma-separated CSS selectors. Each is tried in order until content is found. Leave empty for default chain.
sites.localhostWarning: Local domain: page content cannot be fetched from inside Docker. Content won't be sent to AI. Please deploy to a public server for testing.
sites.emptyContentWarning: AI generated this comment based on the page title only, as the page content could not be fetched.
sites.autoGenHint: Overrides the widget's autoGenerate parameter. When set to "Never Generate", comments won't be generated even if the widget passes autoGenerate: true.
sites.themeHint: Lower priority than widget's theme attribute. Only used when frontend does not specify.
sites.commentPluginHint: Check enabled plugins to show their comments in the widget. When Fediverse is checked, configure it in the Fediverse tab.
sites.showAiBadge: Show AI Badge on AI comments
sites.showAiBadgeHint: Display a small AI label on AI-generated comment avatars.
sites.showReactionsHint: Display emoji reaction buttons on visitor comments.
sites.aiBadgePositionHint: Choose where the AI badge appears. Select "Before Name" to show an AI icon next to the nickname.
sites.showFediBadge: Show Fediverse badge on federated comments
sites.showFediBadgeHint: Display a Fediverse icon before the author name on federated comments.
sites.emailNotifyCommentsHint: Send email notification to the site admin when AI comments are generated. Requires SMTP configuration.
sites.commentGeneratedTemplateHint: Available variables: {{path}} page path, {{domain}} site domain. Leave empty for default template.
sites.rssHint: Configure an RSS feed or Sitemap URL to continuously monitor for new articles. Use 'Import Now' for initial bulk import. Subsequent refresh schedules will check RSS/Sitemap and import new articles into AIGCS.
sites.rssImportDesc: Bulk import articles from RSS or Sitemap, or manually trigger a sync.
sites.rssWarmSkip: Skipped auto-generation. Use the Content tab to generate manually.
sites.rssCronHint: Leave empty to disable scheduled refresh
sites.rssWebhookHint: External systems can notify this endpoint when new content is published
sites.pingReceiverDesc: Send POST requests from external systems to trigger AIGCS features.
sites.webhookOutgoingDesc: Automatically trigger external scripts when AIGCS events occur.
sites.author: Author

prompts.title: Prompt Templates
prompts.importHint: Example repo — copy a raw URL to import

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
profile.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from your app
profile.backupCodes: Save these backup codes. Each can be used once:
profile.enterPassword: Enter your password to start setup
profile.twoFactorDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account.

content.confirmClear: Clear all comments? This cannot be undone!
content.confirmWarm: Generating comments for {{count}} entries will consume AI API tokens. Continue?
content.emptyHint: Use your site's RSS feed as content source. Please import RSS.

providersPage.title: AI Providers
providersPage.description: Configure default API keys and models. Sites can use these presets when adding providers.
providersPage.name: Name
providersPage.blockedInChinaWarning: Note: When deploying on a China mainland VPS, this AI provider's API may be inaccessible. Please verify connectivity before relying on it.
providersPage.avatarSvgHint: Paste SVG code or data:image/svg+xml URL. Leave empty for default.
providersPage.globalPromptHint: Global system prompt (from Settings) is always prepended

pluginsPage.title: Plugins
pluginsPage.noServerPlugins: No server-side plugins registered. Register plugins via code at server startup.
pluginsPage.noInstalledPlugins: No plugins installed. Click "Install Plugin" to add one.
pluginsPage.info: Plugins extend AIGCS with custom hooks. Create a Plugin object with hook functions and call registerPlugin() at server startup. Built-in hook points:
pluginsPage.blockedKeywordsPlaceholder: One keyword per line. Supports .txt, .json, .csv, .yaml, .md — import from file or URL below.
pluginsPage.importUrlPrompt: Enter the URL of the keywords file:
pluginsPage.importError: Failed to import. Check the URL or file format.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_formPosition: Position of the comment form: top or bottom
pluginsPage.settingsHint_aiPosition: Position of AI comments relative to visitor comments: before or after
pluginsPage.settingsHint_fediDisplay: How federated and native comments are displayed: mixed (interleaved by time) or separated into groups.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_fediGroupOrder: When separated, whether the federated group appears before or after the native group.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_timeFormat: Time display format: relative (e.g. "2 hours ago"), absolute, or ISO
pluginsPage.settingsHint_adminPin: PIN for admin authentication to manage comments
pluginsPage.settingsHint_adminEmail: Email(s) associated with the admin PIN. Separate multiple emails with commas.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_captchaEnabled: Require CAPTCHA verification before submitting visitor comments
pluginsPage.smtpNotConfigured: Global SMTP not configured. Please configure it in System Settings.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_gravatarProxy: Gravatar proxy domain, e.g. cn.cravatar.com, weavatar.com. Leave empty for official Gravatar.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_avatarParams: Custom avatar URL parameters, e.g. d=404&s=80. Default: d=mp&s=48
pluginsPage.settingsHint_requiredFields: Comma-separated field names that must be filled. Options: name,email,url. Default: name,email
pluginsPage.settingsHint_blockedKeywords: Comments containing any blocked keyword will be rejected.
pluginsPage.nativeWarningIntro: The native comment plugin has the following limitations compared to dedicated third-party comment systems:
pluginsPage.nativeWarning1: No automatic content moderation — all comments are published immediately without review
pluginsPage.nativeWarning2: No spam filtering or bot detection beyond basic CAPTCHA
pluginsPage.nativeWarning3: No automated content moderation — all comments published immediately
pluginsPage.nativeWarning4: No spam filtering or bot detection
pluginsPage.nativeWarning5: No comment data export or backup tools
pluginsPage.nativeWarning7: Relies on local database; no cloud sync
pluginsPage.settingsHint_showReactions: Display emoji reaction buttons on comments.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_smtp_host: SMTP server hostname. Leave empty to use global system SMTP.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_smtp_from_email: Sender email address for notification emails.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_notify_email: Email address to receive new comment notifications. Defaults to site owner's email.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_notify_on_comment: Send email notification when a new comment is submitted.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_edit_window_minutes: Minutes after submission during which the author can edit their comment.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_reply_notification: Send notification to the original author when someone replies to their comment.
pluginsPage.replyNotificationTemplateHint: Available variables: {{authorName}} replier name, {{domain}} site domain, {{path}} page path, {{pageUrl}} full page URL, {{content}} reply content. Leave empty for default template.
pluginsPage.replyNotificationDefaultTemplate:
{{authorName}} replied to your comment on {{domain}}{{path}}:

{{{content}}}
pluginsPage.settingsHint_emailDeletion: Allow visitors to delete their own comments via email verification.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_emailDomainMode: Off: no restriction. Whitelist: only allow these domains. Blacklist: block these domains.
pluginsPage.settingsHint_emailDomains: Comma-separated list of email domains. Click the tags below to toggle common domains.
pluginsPage.smtpGlobalNotConfigured: Global SMTP is not configured. Please configure it in System Settings or switch to Custom SMTP.
pluginsPage.mastodonSettingsHint: Please configure the Fedi plugin in Site Settings.
pluginsPage.nativeSettingsHint: Please configure in Site Settings > Comment Plugin Settings.

fedi.title: Fediverse
fedi.searchPlaceholder: Search keyword or leave empty to use article path
fedi.statusIdHint: Enter a Status ID or full Fediverse post URL
fedi.autoFetchHint: When off, fetches live from fediverse on every widget request. When on, caches comments and refreshes at the set interval. Recommended ON for high-traffic sites, OFF for low-traffic sites.
fedi.deleteConfirm: Delete this binding? Associated cached data will also be removed.
fedi.noBindings: No bindings yet. Click 'Add Binding' to start.
fedi.noComments: No cached comments. Click 'Refresh' to fetch from instance.
fedi.noBinding: Not bound to a Fediverse status
fedi.bindingsHint: Enter a Fediverse URL to bind to a slug. You can also publish a toot to the authorized instance for automatic binding.
fedi.bindFormHint: Bindings will use the instance configured above.
fedi.revokeConfirm: This will clear the stored access token locally and attempt to revoke it on the remote instance. Continue?
fedi.reauthorizeConfirm: Re-authorizing will overwrite the current access token. Continue?
fedi.fedAdminAcctHint: Enter your fedi account (e.g. @admin@example.com). The domain will be used to resolve local accounts without domain. Optional, mainly for split-domain setups.
fedi.oauthHint: After authorization, the access token is stored server-side and never exposed in the frontend. You will complete authorization on your instance's domain.
fedi.batchImportHint: JSON array format, each item must contain slug (article path) and statusUrl (full Fediverse post URL). Optional fields: instanceType, instanceUrl.

errors.notAuthorized: Instance not authorized. Please complete OAuth first.
errors.authorMismatch: Status author does not match authorized account
errors.slugDuplicated: This path is already bound to a status
errors.statusDuplicated: This status is already bound to another page

common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
